judge_thought: The question asks which participant came in first while also coming in last. From the original table, the first-place participant is Doriano Romboni (Honda). The last-place participant (excluding retirements and DNS) is Alessandro Gramigni (Gilera). There is no single participant who holds both the first and last positions in the race results. Consequently, the Prediction Answer of 'none' is correct.
